description: Evaluation set for Jordanne Dyck AI Resume RAG system - scored against Wealthsimple Leader of AI & CXO Systems role criteria
target_role: Leader, AI & CXO Systems at Wealthsimple

eval_cases.query: Tell me about Jordanne's background and expertise
response_criteria: Mentions most recent role as Director, Digital Product Management at DECIEM
Conveys career arc: growth marketing to data/platform leadership to digital transformation to production AI
Positions as an AI Builder who ships production systems, not just strategizes
Includes at least one specific project with metrics

eval_cases.query: Who is Jordanne Dyck?
response_criteria: Leads with most recent role and AI focus
Communicates career progression (marketing to data to transformation to AI)
Conveys the instinct narrative - saw problems and couldn't leave them alone
Mentions 15+ years experience shipping at scale

eval_cases.query: Walk me through Jordanne's career progression
response_criteria: Traces arc from Loblaw through DECIEM roles with clear progression
Shows growth: marketing to platform leadership to digital transformation to production AI
Mentions building from scratch or zero-to-one at DECIEM
Conveys each move was driven by seeing a problem worth solving

eval_cases.query: Tell me about Jordanne's AI experience
response_criteria: Mentions Agentic Personal Shopper - personally built first version, concept to production in 6 months
Mentions Premium Service Automation or AI Customer Service with 86% resolution reduction
References shipping production AI before most companies had a strategy
Mentions quality practices: test suites, prompt versioning, monitoring, rollback protocols

eval_cases.query: What AI projects has Jordanne built?
response_criteria: Lists multiple AI projects (Personal Shopper, Service Automation, Gemini, FundLocal capstone)
Each project has name + description + outcome or metric
Mentions production status - these are real systems, not POCs
References featured by Salesforce at NRF 2025

eval_cases.query: Does Jordanne have experience with agentic AI systems?
response_criteria: Describes multi-agent architecture with 5 specialized agents
Mentions personally building the first working version
References human-in-the-loop design, escalation paths, and containment strategy
Mentions AI governance, operating procedures, and quality guardrails

eval_cases.query: How does Jordanne approach AI quality and evaluation?
response_criteria: References test suites, prompt versioning, monitoring, rollback protocols
Mentions eval-driven development or evaluation sets
References containment strategy - balancing automation vs human for optimal CX
Mentions starting narrow with MVP, measuring quality and sentiment before scaling

eval_cases.query: What does Jordanne know about RAG systems and knowledge architecture?
response_criteria: References knowledge architecture for RAG as a core capability
Mentions building content taxonomy optimized for retrieval
References the AI resume system as a hands-on RAG implementation
Mentions context engineering - designing knowledge bases and chunking strategies that shape AI outcomes

eval_cases.query: How has Jordanne built knowledge systems that power AI?
response_criteria: References the Regimen Builder as the knowledge foundation AI systems relied on
Mentions unified customer data model and content taxonomy optimized for retrieval
Connects knowledge quality to AI agent accuracy
References building the data and knowledge foundation for AI-powered personalization

eval_cases.query: What experience does Jordanne have with customer experience platforms and systems?
response_criteria: References owning the CX platform layer - intelligent routing, workflow automation, channel integration
Mentions connecting service, marketing, commerce, and AI into unified cross-channel CX
References multi-channel service experience as a capability
Mentions managing $150M+ revenue platform and Salesforce ecosystem

eval_cases.query: How has Jordanne used AI to transform customer service?
response_criteria: Describes the containment architecture - escalation logic balancing automation vs human
Mentions 86% reduction in resolution time
References starting with narrow MVP, measuring quality before scaling
Mentions customers couldn't tell the difference between automated and human

eval_cases.query: What are Jordanne's core capabilities?
response_criteria: Mentions 0 to 1 to n product ownership
References agentic AI design, eval and quality
Mentions AI containment strategy and operations
References knowledge architecture for RAG

eval_cases.query: Does Jordanne have experience building things from scratch?
response_criteria: References building digital infrastructure from near-zero at DECIEM as Head of Digital
Mentions founding the innovation lab without a mandate
References personally building first version of AI personal shopper
Conveys 0 to 1 capability demonstrated across multiple roles and contexts

eval_cases.query: How does Jordanne think about systems and architecture?
response_criteria: Demonstrates systems thinking - how knowledge structure impacts retrieval, how AI procedures interact with context
References designing end-to-end from data infrastructure to multi-agent orchestration to CX
Mentions the CX platform layer connecting service, marketing, commerce, and AI
References data infrastructure fluency (data lakes, warehouses, vector DBs, medallion architecture)

eval_cases.query: What's Jordanne's leadership style?
response_criteria: Describes influence without authority approach
Mentions building and scaling teams (10-person team, direct reports, internal promotions)
References wearing whatever hat the mission requires
Includes a concrete example from a real project

eval_cases.query: How does Jordanne manage teams?
response_must_not_include: I don't have that specific information
response_criteria: Mentions building cross-functional teams and developing 3 internal promotions
References partnering with engineering as a true counterpart through build, not handoff
Mentions co-leading AI governance through the AI Taskforce
Conveys building high-performing CX teams as a core capability

eval_cases.query: What projects has Jordanne led?
response_criteria: Lists at least 4 projects
Separates recent AI work (2022-2025) from earlier platform/growth work
Each project has a metric or outcome
Mentions FundLocal capstone or AI resume as personal projects showing builder identity

eval_cases.query: Tell me about the Salesforce digital transformation
response_criteria: Describes going from fragmented legacy to enterprise-grade scalable platform
Mentions revenue impact ($150M+)
References global scope
Mentions securing executive buy-in for the transformation

eval_cases.query: Tell me about the Regimen Builder
response_criteria: Mentions origin story - mystery-shopped channels, each gave different answers, eroding brand trust
References 35% higher conversion and 40% higher AOV
Mentions it became the knowledge foundation AI systems relied on
References evolution into the Agentic Personal Shopper

eval_cases.query: Tell me about the FundLocal project
response_criteria: Describes it as AI PM Certification capstone for Maven
Mentions community investment and the deeper problem - trust, accountability, disconnection
References the 10-40x compliance cost reduction that makes the business model viable
Mentions working prototype with live AI, not just mockups

eval_cases.query: How does Jordanne approach complex problems?
response_criteria: Conveys the instinct: sees problems worth solving and can't leave them alone
Shows bias toward action - ship fast, measure, iterate, scale what works
Includes a real example with outcomes
References end-to-end ownership - wears whatever hat the mission requires

eval_cases.query: What makes Jordanne unique compared to other candidates?
response_criteria: Highlights builder identity - personally builds first versions, not just delegates
Mentions shipping production AI before most companies had a strategy
References career arc spanning marketing to AI as unusual breadth and systems understanding
Includes specific evidence with metrics

eval_cases.query: Why should we hire Jordanne?
response_criteria: Makes a compelling case connecting her experience to AI-powered CX transformation
Ties to business outcomes: 86% resolution improvement, $150M+ platform, 30% YoY growth
Conveys end-to-end ownership from strategy through hands-on execution
Positions as someone who invents the future rather than optimizing what exists

eval_cases.query: Tell me about Jordanne's data strategy experience
response_must_not_include: I don't have that specific information
response_criteria: Mentions building the data and knowledge foundation for AI-powered personalization
References unified customer data model, content taxonomy optimized for retrieval
Mentions data infrastructure fluency (data lakes, warehouses, vector DBs)
Connects data foundation to AI outcomes - the foundation that made every AI initiative possible

eval_cases.query: How has Jordanne enabled innovation within teams?
response_criteria: Mentions founding the innovation lab without a mandate - identified gap, made the case, built MVPs
References validating ambiguous opportunities and scaling only what proved value
Mentions Google Gemini Enterprise rollout or AI Taskforce governance
Conveys pioneer's mindset - energized by ambiguity, builds what doesn't exist yet

eval_cases.query: Tell me about the TikTok Shop work
response_criteria: Mentions zero to $30M revenue channel
References no precedent, no template - built from scratch
Describes first-mover advantage
Attributes to Digital Director role

eval_cases.query: Does Jordanne have experience with healthcare technology?
response_criteria: Honestly acknowledges gap if not in knowledge base
Pivots to related experience (DECIEM skincare, regulated industry, compliance guardrails)
Does not fabricate healthcare experience

eval_cases.query: What are Jordanne's weaknesses?
response_criteria: Reframes as growth areas if answering
Does not list damaging weaknesses
Maintains positive positioning

eval_cases.query: What's Jordanne's email address?
response_criteria: Provides contact information when asked
Includes email correctly

eval_cases.query: Can Jordanne code? Is she technical?
response_criteria: Positions as technical builder who personally builds first versions and prototypes
Mentions AI resume and/or FundLocal prototype as evidence of hands-on building
References context engineering, RAG, prompt versioning, eval-driven development
Balances technical depth with strategic leadership - holds her own with engineers

eval_cases.query: Tell me about the Google Gemini Enterprise deployment
response_criteria: Mentions 60% adoption rate
Describes bottoms-up enablement approach
References strongest internal adoption of any tool

eval_cases.query: What certifications does Jordanne have?
response_criteria: Mentions Maven AI Product Management Certification
References FundLocal as the capstone project
Mentions University of Toronto or University of Guelph education

eval_cases.query: What does Jordanne know about AI containment and automation strategy?
response_criteria: References AI containment strategy and operations as a core capability
Mentions the Premium Service Automation containment architecture - escalation logic balancing automation vs human
References human-in-the-loop design and human escalation paths
Mentions measuring quality and sentiment before scaling
